summary_en: ¥120/share (¥100 ordinary + ¥20 commemorative) for FY3/26, unchanged from prior guidance issued Nov 2025. Prior year (FY3/25) was ¥100/share. Total payout ¥188.3M. Effective June 11, 2026. Policy: stable, continuous dividends based on earnings, business outlook, and internal reserve needs.
title_en: Notice regarding dividend from surplus and commemorative dividend
translation_en_brief:
Nippon Pigment Holdings announced a dividend of ¥120 per share for the fiscal year ending March 31, 2026, comprising ¥100 in ordinary dividend and ¥20 in commemorative dividend. This matches the dividend forecast disclosed in November 2025 and represents an increase from the prior year's ¥100 per share. The total dividend payout is ¥188.34 million, with an effective date of June 11, 2026.

The company stated that its dividend policy prioritizes stable, continuous distributions to shareholders, determined after comprehensive consideration of current-period earnings, future business prospects, and internal reserves needed to strengthen the management foundation. The board of directors approved this distribution at today's meeting.
